zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Giffard於1272年12月出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德時，她的父親John Giffard40歲，母親Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury40歲。她於1287年10月23日與Nicholas d'Audley在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年1月23日在英國賀福爾萊德波利享年51歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾布拉可麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Giffard于1272年12月出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德时，她的父亲John Giffard40岁，母亲Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury40岁。她于1287年10月23日与Nicholas d'Audley在英国格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年1月23日在英国賀福爾萊德波利享年51岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾布拉可麥。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Giffard was born in December 1272, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Giffard, was 40 and her mother, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, was 40. She married Nicholas d'Audley on 23 October 1287, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 January 1324, in Ledbury, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Giffard est née en décembre 1272, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Giffard, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas d'Audley le 23 octobre 1287, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1324, à Ledbury, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Giffard im Dezember 1272 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Giffard 40 und ihre Mutter Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury 40. Sie hat am 23. Oktober 1287 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England Nicholas d'Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Januar 1324 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ledbury, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Giffard è nata il nel dicembre 1272 nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Giffard, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas d'Audley il 23 ottobre 1287, nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 gennaio 1324, nel Ledbury, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Blakemere, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Giffardが1272年12月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで生まれた時，父John Giffardは40歳，母Maud Clifford Countess of Salisburyは40歳であった。1287年10月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドでNicholas d'Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年1月23日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレドブリーで51歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Giffard(이)가 1272년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Giffard(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1287년 10월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 Nicholas d'Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 1월 23일 영국 허퍼드실르 레드버이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Giffard nasceu em dezembro de 1272, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Giffard, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas d'Audley em 23 de outubro de 1287, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1324, em Ledbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Giffard родилась декабрь 1272 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Giffard было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas d'Audley 23 октября 1287 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 января 1324 г. в местности ледбури, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Giffard nació en diciembre de 1272, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Giffard, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Nicholas d'Audley el 23 de octubre de 1287, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de enero de 1324, en Ledbury, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
